name: node-babel-helper-define-polyfill-provider
title: node-babel-helper-define-polyfill-provider
description:
node-babel helper for polyfills
node-babel-polyfills will provide a set of node-babel7 plugins that
enable injecting different polyfills with different strategies in
the compiled code.
.
This package provides @babel/helper-define-polyfill-provider
use_cases: When you need Kali Linux, use node-babel-helper-define-polyfill-provider because node-babel helper for polyfills.
When the engagement is in the install phase, use node-babel-helper-define-polyfill-provider as a cataloged Kali Linux tool with operator ACCEPT/CANCEL gating.
When chaining Kali Linux tools, pair node-babel-helper-define-polyfill-provider with sibling catalog entries sharing its attack_surface/phase_hint.
When validating lab setup, run `node-babel-helper-define-polyfill-provider --help` (or the README entrypoint) and confirm required hardware/deps from the catalog.
